name: 水浒群侠传
short_description: The Legend of the Heroes of the Water Margin is an ancient Chinese RPG game based on Shi Naian's novel Water Margin, in which players can have adventures with some of Shi Naian's characters from the protagonist's point of view. This only to understand the purpose of the protagonist is to find.
detailed_description:
The Legend of the Heroes of the Water Margin is an ancient Chinese RPG game based on Shi Naian's novel Water Margin, in which players can have adventures with some of Shi Naian's characters from the protagonist's point of view. After waking up, the protagonist finds himself in a strange "home". This only to understand the purpose of the protagonist is to find the thirty-six Tiangang that is considered to be Liangshan heroes by people in rivers and lakes, and then to make a choice in the Song Dynasty Jin, and then go to the church to change the course of history.

You need to use your talents along the way. Choose a variety of paths? Your attack, defense, and blood all depend on the path you choose.

Every decision matters, especially in your social life. You need to balance interpersonal relationships and possible celebrity identity, but also need to learn and find scattered in the rivers and lakes Liangshan heroes, kill Gao Qiu, anti song anti gold.

- Story development management simulation with role playing and development elements

- Lead Liangshan heroes to kill Gao Qiu and fight against Song and Jin

- Driven by the story, you can choose different plots and explore different game endings

- Deep understanding of statistics and defining your own path through a multitude of skills

- Pixel picture, all places reflect the style of the Northern Song Dynasty, showing a strong retro style
